{{Infobox character
| name = Blue Knight
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Blue Knight]] wields elemental water as a weapon.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c1">''The Captain'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The narrator served as the [[Blue Knight]] of the [[Titan Force]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c32">''The Captain'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The narrator identifies as the [[Blue Knight]] when entering the combat zone.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c42">''The Knight'', chapter 42</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Blue Knight]] is the designation used by the pilot when withdrawing.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44">''The Knight'', chapter 44</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“Blue Knight entering the combat zone,” I said.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c42" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
